analyst_note: Main claim: "Orion has committed to reach net-zero emissions by 2050" (orion-financial-statement-documents-2025-2.pdf, p63). SBTi: Targets set, 1.5°C near-term target (2030). 8-Test: 0 PARTIAL, 0 FAIL, 0 MISSING -> PASS. Source is the CSRD sustainability statement within Orion's financial-statement documents. SBTi-approved 70%-by-2030 target, explicit 2023 baseline, full scope coverage, limited assurance. One MED (assurance level).
